All Classes and Interfaces|All Packages|Serialized Form

A

acknowledgePlayer(Player, String) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.controller.virtualview.RMIVirtualView
the acknowledgePlayer method implements the usage of the method in the VirtualView Interface, for the players with an RMI connection.
acknowledgePlayer(Player, String) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.controller.virtualview.TCPVirtualView
the acknowledgePlayer method implements the usage of the method in the VirtualView Interface, for the players with a TCP connection.
acknowledgePlayer(Player, String) - Method in interface it.polimi.ingsw.am37.controller.virtualview.VirtualView
the acknowledgePlayer method is called to send to the player confirmations about the previews action of the player.
addClient(RMIClientSkeleton, GameController) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.controller.MultipleMatchesHandler
the addClient method puts in the mapRMI a new ClientSkeleton and the controller associated.
addClient(ClientHandler, GameController) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.controller.MultipleMatchesHandler
the addClient method puts a new a ClientHandler and the Controller associated in the map.
addLobby(int, GameController) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.controller.MultipleMatchesHandler
the addLobby method puts in the lobbyList map a new lobby identified by an Integer and the controller associated.
addPlayer(Player) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.controller.GameController
the addPlayer method adds a new player to the game before instancing the game, linking to each of them a VirtualView everytime a player is added, proceeds then to call gamePhaseHandler which will set up the players.
addPlayer(ClientSidePlayer) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.view.clientmodel.ClientSideGameModel
Adds a player to the list of players.
addPoints(Player, int) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.model.game.Scoreboard
The addPoints(t, points) method receives the token of a player and a number of points as parameters and adds the points to the value already stored in the table.
addPoints(Front, int) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.view.clientmodel.ClientSidePlayer
Method that adds points to the player.
AlreadyAssignedException - Exception Class in it.polimi.ingsw.am37.exceptions
the alreadyAssignedException is a class that represents an Exception in case an object has already been assigned.
AlreadyAssignedException(String) - Constructor for exception class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.exceptions.AlreadyAssignedException
AlreadyAssignedException is a setter method of the exception, which gives the message to send and calls the method of the super class.
ANIMAL - Enum constant in enum class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.model.game.Resource
The Animal resource also can represent the colour blue of the card.
askLobbies() - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.view.virtualserver.RMIVirtualServer
This method is used to ask the server for the list of available lobbies.
askLobbies() - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.view.virtualserver.TCPVirtualServer
This method sends a message to the server to ask for the available lobbies.
askLobbies() - Method in interface it.polimi.ingsw.am37.view.virtualserver.VirtualServer
This method is used to ask the server to send the list of the available lobbies.
availableLobbies(RMIClientSkeleton) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.network.server.RMIServer
This method is used to get the available lobbies.
availableLobbies(RMIClientSkeleton) - Method in interface it.polimi.ingsw.am37.network.server.RMIServerStub
This method is used to get the available lobbies.
availGold1Clicked(ActionEvent) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.view.GUI.controllers.KingdomController
Action of the availGold1 button, draws the first available gold card
availGold2Clicked(ActionEvent) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.view.GUI.controllers.KingdomController
Action of the availGold2 button, draws the second available gold card
availRes1Clicked(ActionEvent) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.view.GUI.controllers.KingdomController
Action of the availRes1 button, draws the first available resource card
availRes2Clicked(ActionEvent) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.view.GUI.controllers.KingdomController
Action of the availRes2 button, draws the second available resource card
